# Package Evaluation Report

## Job Properties

*Commits:* [JuliaLang/julia@5880661aca394dd08f3c9433af291a67c9078bee](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/commit/5880661aca394dd08f3c9433af291a67c9078bee) vs [JuliaLang/julia@4e8acb4028272b659ad748bbf4ab1233c39a65c3](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/commit/4e8acb4028272b659ad748bbf4ab1233c39a65c3)

*Triggered By:* [link](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/61596#issuecomment-4270091241)

Testing took 19 hours, 36 minutes, 3 seconds (or, sequentially, 38 days, 3 hours, 9 minutes, 23 seconds to evaluate 23424 packages).

In total, 11712 packages were evaluated, out of which 5910 successfully tested, 0 were not tested but did load successfully, 455 crashed, 3935 failed and 1412 were skipped.


<details><summary>On this build, 16 packages started failing. Click here for the Nanosoldier invocation to re-run these tests.</summary>
<p>

```
@nanosoldier `runtests(["FMICore", "GeoInterface", "Gabs", "Catch22", "LLMCheatsheets", "Oxygen", "SteadyStateDiffEq", "Isoplot", "SciBmad", "ApproxManifoldProducts", "ElemCo", "NeuralLyapunovProblemLibrary", "ControlSystemsMTK", "Yunir", "Drifters", "PowerGraphics"])`
```

</p>
</details>
